_note: Status 'mapped' means the component has been mapped to this criterion. It does not mean the criterion has been verified by a formal audit. Run audit-rules.json checks and update validation_status before changing overall_status.

criteria.title: Non-text Content
criteria.evidence: With Icon type: icon SVG carries aria-hidden='true'. The list item text in .list__text provides the accessible label. No informative icon exists without adjacent text.

criteria.title: Info and Relationships
criteria.evidence: Native <ol> and <ul> elements convey list structure to assistive technology. role='list' restores semantics when list-style:none is applied (VoiceOver/Safari workaround). List item nesting is represented via Level Two items with visual indent.

criteria.title: Contrast (Minimum)
criteria.evidence: Primary: #1B8354 on white background ≈ 5.27:1 (passes AA 4.5:1 for normal text). Neutral: #161616 on white ≈ 19.5:1 (passes). On-Color: #FFF on dark/brand context — contrast depends on consuming background; per-deployment verification required.

criteria.title: Visual Presentation
criteria.evidence: Text is not justified. Width is not constrained by component. Font size is 16px (1rem equivalent). Line height is 24px (150%). User can override via browser settings.

criteria.title: Keyboard
criteria.evidence: List items are not interactive. No keyboard interaction is required or expected. The list does not intercept keyboard events.

criteria.title: Parsing
criteria.evidence: HTML is valid. <ol>/<ul> contain only <li> children. No duplicate IDs. All elements are properly nested.

criteria.title: Name, Role, Value
criteria.evidence: Container uses native <ol>/<ul> with role='list'. Items use native <li>. Icon carries aria-hidden='true'. Text content provides accessible name for every item.

criteria.title: List must use native HTML list element
criteria.evidence: Ordered lists use <ol>. Unordered and With Icon lists use <ul>. list-style: none is applied in CSS with role='list' to restore semantics.

criteria.title: List item must use native <li> element
criteria.evidence: All list items are rendered as <li> elements.

criteria.title: Marker text must be present for ordered and unordered types
criteria.evidence: Marker span .list__marker is required for ordered and unordered types. With Icon type replaces marker with .list__icon.

criteria.title: Icon must carry aria-hidden
criteria.evidence: .list__icon contains aria-hidden='true' on the icon wrapper. The SVG inside also carries aria-hidden='true'.

criteria.title: Component CSS must use component-level semantic tokens
criteria.evidence: All CSS properties use --list-* tokens. Fallback values reference global tokens. All component tokens are documented in reference.json as pending addition to token.css.

criteria.title: RTL support via dir attribute
criteria.evidence: RTL is supported via dir='rtl' on the container or parent. padding-inline-start (logical CSS) handles indent automatically. No separate RTL CSS block required.

on_color.note: The On-Color style variant renders white text (#FFF). Contrast ratio depends on the background provided by the consuming layout. This component does not define its own background. Per-deployment contrast verification is required.
